title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Post-Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research, Chandigarh, Act 1966. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 1st April, 1967, vide notification No. S.O. 1115(E), dated 29th March, 1967, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
